Sentral — Group Business

More space.
Better service.
For your whole group.

Whether you’re booking a team of two or two hundred, Sentral delivers furnished apartment suites with hotel-caliber service across 13 states and 41 communities. Business travel, corporate housing, group stays, and unforgettable occasions — handled.

Submit an RFP
Our team responds within 1 business day
Business Travel Groups & Blocks Corporate Housing All Occasions
Why Sentral for groups

Hotel service.
Apartment space.
One platform.

Sentral is not a hotel chain — we’re a full-service residential hospitality operator. Your team gets more space, real kitchens, in-unit laundry, and the kind of consistency that corporate travel managers actually depend on. Across 13 states and 41 communities in the country’s top business markets.

We work with relocation management companies, travel management companies, corporate travel buyers, and event planners to create seamless group experiences. One point of contact. One standard. Everywhere.

01 — Business Travel

Elevated stays for
the modern professional.

Solo travelers, project teams, and executives who expect more than a hotel room. Sentral delivers.

A simplified approach to business travel.

Furnished apartment suites with hotel-caliber service — purpose-built for today’s business travelers. Whether you’re traveling solo, coordinating a team stay, or relocating for a long-term project, Sentral provides turnkey accommodations in top business destinations. Stay for a few nights, a few months, or longer.

Turnkey furnished suites with full kitchens and in-unit laundry
Seamless check-in and 24/7 on-site hospitality team
Co-working stations and elevated amenity spaces
Pet-friendly with flexible term stays
Preferred corporate partnership rates available
02 — Groups & Room Blocks

Group. Corporate.
Extended.

Six rooms to full-building buyouts. Our group sales team handles every detail from block management to VIP check-in.

Sentral has your room blocks covered.

From intimate conference rooms to expansive outdoor terraces, fire pits, and rooftop lounges — our communities are designed to bring people together in a more relaxed, elevated setting. Whether you need six rooms or sixty, our group sales team manages every detail.

Dedicated group sales manager for every booking
Flexible block sizes — 6 rooms to full-building buyouts
Meeting spaces, terraces, and event-ready lounges
Custom arrival experiences and amenity activations
03 — Corporate Housing

30+ nights.
Fully managed.

Premium corporate housing for relocating employees, project teams, and extended assignments across 13 states.

The home-away-from-home for your team.

Premium furnished residences ideal for corporate travelers, relocating employees, and project teams. Flexible stay lengths, dedicated corporate support, and full-time property teams make it seamless — whether you’re housing one executive or an entire project team.

Class A communities with centralized operating standards
Move-in ready — full kitchens, linens, everything included
Flexible 30+ night stays structured for corporate placements
Multi-unit group block capability for team housing
All occasions

Whatever brings
your group together.

From wedding weekend room blocks to sports team travel, Sentral has the space, the service, and the locations.

Your Big Day
Weddings & Celebrations
Bridal suite rooms, bachelor and bachelorette blocks, and wedding weekend accommodations for the whole party.
Business
Team Off-Sites & Meetings
Corporate retreats and leadership off-sites in spaces that inspire. Private meeting rooms and outdoor terraces available.
Athletics
Sports Team Travel
Spacious suites that keep teams comfortable and game-ready. Away games, tournaments, playoffs — we cover all bases.
Family
Reunions & Milestones
Full kitchens, multiple bedrooms, and enough space for everyone. Perfect for family reunions and multigenerational travel.
